sections.paragraph:
προσϰαρτερέω [πρός, καρτερέω]

—1. ‘attend to with continuing resoluteness’, of carrying out religious obligation, persist in, tend to Ac 1:14; 2:42, 46; 6:4; Ro 12:12; Col 4:2; of official obligation, attend to Ro 13:6; of maintaining close adherence, keep close to Ac 8:13.

—2. ‘be close at hand for service’, a boat Mk 3:9; a soldier Ac 10:7.
